mapper.select: with ranked as ( select v.conversation_id as id, v.display_name as title, v.partner_id as invited_id, v.partner_name as invited_name, v.partner_handle as invited_handle, case when sub_msg.has_file and coalesce(sub_msg.content, '') = '' then case when sub_msg.content_type::text like 'image%' then '[사진]' else '[파일]' end else sub_msg.content end as last_message, sub_msg.created_datetime as last_message_time, coalesce(unread_msg.cnt, 0) as unread_count, v.created_datetime, v.updated_datetime, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = v.partner_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as partner_profile_file_name, row_number() over ( partition by least(v.member_id, v.partner_id), greatest(v.member_id, v.partner_id) order by coalesce(sub_msg.created_datetime, v.created_datetime) desc, v.conversation_id desc ) as rn from v_my_chat v left join lateral ( select msg.content, msg.created_datetime, (cf.id is not null) as has_file, f.content_type from tbl_message msg left join tbl_chat_file cf on cf.message_id = msg.id left join tbl_file f on f.id = cf.id left join tbl_message_deletion md on md.message_id = msg.id and md.member_id = #{memberId} where msg.conversation_id = v.conversation_id and msg.is_deleted = false and md.message_id is null and msg.id > coalesce( (select deleted_after_message_id from tbl_conversation_setting where conversation_id = v.conversation_id and member_id = #{memberId}), 0) and not ( msg.sender_id != #{memberId} and exists ( select 1 from tbl_conversation_setting cs_block where cs_block.conversation_id = v.conversation_id and cs_block.member_id = #{memberId} and cs_block.blocked_after_message_id is not null and msg.id > cs_block.blocked_after_message_id and (cs_block.block_released_message_id is null or msg.id <= cs_block.block_released_message_id) ) ) order by msg.created_datetime desc limit 1 ) sub_msg on true left join lateral ( select count(*) as cnt from tbl_message msg2 join tbl_conversation_setting cs2 on cs2.conversation_id = v.conversation_id and cs2.member_id = #{memberId} where msg2.conversation_id = v.conversation_id and msg2.is_deleted = false and msg2.sender_id != #{memberId} and msg2.id > coalesce(v.my_last_read, 0) and not ( cs2.blocked_after_message_id is not null and msg2.id > cs2.blocked_after_message_id and (cs2.block_released_message_id is null or msg2.id <= cs2.block_released_message_id) ) ) unread_msg on true where v.member_id = #{memberId} and coalesce(v.is_deleted, false) = false ) select r.id, r.title, r.invited_id, r.invited_name, r.invited_handle, r.last_message, r.last_message_time, r.unread_count, r.created_datetime, r.updated_datetime, r.partner_profile_file_name from ranked r where rn = 1 order by coalesce(last_message_time, created_datetime) desc, id desc

select c.id, c.title, rel.sender_id, rel.invited_id, c.created_datetime from tbl_conversation c join tbl_conversation_member_rel rel on c.id = rel.conversation_id where (rel.sender_id = #{senderId} and rel.invited_id = #{invitedId}) or (rel.sender_id = #{invitedId} and rel.invited_id = #{senderId}) order by c.created_datetime desc, c.id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
select currval('tbl_conversation_id_seq')
insert into tbl_conversation (title) values (#{title})
insert into tbl_conversation_member_rel (conversation_id, sender_id, invited_id) values (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{invitedId})
insert into tbl_conversation_setting (conversation_id, member_id) values (#{conversationId}, #{memberId}) on conflict (conversation_id, member_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update tbl_conversation_setting set is_deleted = false, updated_datetime = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and member_id = #{memberId} and is_deleted = true
mapper.select: select member_id from tbl_conversation_setting where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = true
mapper.update: update tbl_conversation_setting set is_deleted = false, updated_datetime = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = true
mapper.select: select v.partner_id as invited_id, v.partner_name as invited_name, v.partner_handle as invited_handle, v.alias, v.conversation_id as id, v.display_name as title, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = v.partner_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as partner_profile_file_name from v_my_chat v where v.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and v.member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
select max(id) from tbl_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_conversation_setting ( conversation_id, member_id, last_read_message_id, created_datetime, updated_datetime ) values (#{conversationId}, #{memberId}, #{lastReadMessageId}, now(), now()) on conflict (conversation_id, member_id) do update set last_read_message_id = greatest( coalesce(tbl_conversation_setting.last_read_message_id, 0), excluded.last_read_message_id ), updated_datetime = now()
mapper.select: select coalesce(disappear_message, 'none') as setting, disappear_activated_at as activated_at from tbl_conversation_setting where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and member_id = #{memberId}
